title: The Gong Lab
text:
The Gong Lab develops AI and informatics methods to improve clinical trial matching, real-world evidence generation, oncology trial design, and equitable access to precision cancer care.
Our work integrates electronic health records, clinical natural language processing, large language models, real-world data, and clinical trial evidence synthesis.
